{ "name": "ms", "version": "2.1.3", "description": "Tiny millisecond conversion utility", "repository": "vercel/ms", "main": "./index", "files": [ "index.js" ], "scripts": { "precommit": "lint-staged", "lint": "eslint lib/* bin/*", "test": "mocha tests.js" }, "eslintConfig": { "extends": "eslint:recommended", "env": { "node": true, "es6": true } }, "lint-staged": { "*.js": [ "npm run lint", "prettier --single-quote --write", "git add" ] }, "license": "MIT", "devDependencies": { "eslint": "4.18.2", "expect.js": "0.3.1", "husky": "0.14.3", "lint-staged": "5.0.0", "mocha": "4.0.1", "prettier": "2.0.5" } }
